infiltration_tactics.name: Infiltration Tactics
infiltration_tactics.description: Focuses on small unit infiltration, bypassing strongpoints, and rapid exploitation.

stormtrooper_doctrine.name: Stormtrooper Doctrine
stormtrooper_doctrine.description: Emphasizes shock troops, close coordination with artillery, and aggressive assault tactics.

school_of_maneuver.name: School of Maneuver
school_of_maneuver.description: Prioritizes speed, deep exploitation, and bypassing enemy strongpoints.

school_of_layered_defense.name: School of Layered Defense
school_of_layered_defense.description: Emphasizes defensive depth, resilience, and wearing down the attacker.

combined_arms_school.name: Combined Arms School
combined_arms_school.description: Improves coordination between infantry, armor, artillery, and air support.

network_centric_warfare.name: Network-Centric Warfare
network_centric_warfare.description: Leverages information dominance, real-time coordination, and precision engagement.

precision_strike_doctrine.name: Precision Strike Doctrine
precision_strike_doctrine.description: Focuses on high-accuracy strikes and minimizing collateral damage.

drone_swarm_coordination.name: Drone Swarm Coordination
drone_swarm_coordination.description: Specializes in commanding and coordinating large numbers of unmanned systems.

staff_college_tradition.name: Staff College Tradition
staff_college_tradition.description: Broad command staff training available without a national doctrine gate (testing).

logistics_mastery_track.name: Logistics Mastery Track
logistics_mastery_track.description: Supply, sustainment, and reinforcement focus for any leader (testing).

expeditionary_command.name: Expeditionary Command
expeditionary_command.description: Joint expeditionary operations and rapid theater entry (testing).

fortification_specialist.name: Fortification Specialist
fortification_specialist.description: Engineering-minded defensive warfare without doctrine prerequisites (testing).

joint_fire_coordination.name: Joint Fire Coordination
joint_fire_coordination.description: Artillery and air-ground fire coordination school (testing).

reconnaissance_first.name: Reconnaissance First
reconnaissance_first.description: ISR-led operations and initiative through information (testing).

reserve_management_school.name: Reserve Management School
reserve_management_school.description: Casualty control and operational recovery between battles (testing).
